---
title: "Pierpaolo Vendittelli"
title-meta: "Pierpaolo Vendittelli | Medical AI, Computational Pathology, and ML Engineering"
description: "Postdoc researcher developing deep-learning systems for digital pathology — whole-slide image analysis, multi-center clinical AI pipelines, and LLM-based automation for research workflows."
image: assets/logo.png
page-layout: full
body-classes: page-home
toc: false
---

::: {.hero}
::: {.container}
::: {.hero-inner}

::: {.hero-text}

::: {.hero-name}
Pierpaolo Vendittelli
:::

::: {.subtitle}
Postdoc Researcher · Medical AI & Computational Pathology
:::

::: {.location}
📍 Nijmegen, The Netherlands &nbsp;·&nbsp; Open to Italy · Remote EU · US-remote
:::

I am Pierpaolo Vendittelli, a postdoctoral researcher developing deep-learning systems for digital pathology, spanning whole-slide image segmentation, multi-center clinical AI pipelines, prognostic modeling, and downstream applications of foundation models.
My current work focuses on Wilms tumor grading at the Prinses Maxima Center for Pediatric Oncology. During my PhD at Radboud University Medical Center, I worked on pancreatic cancer prognosis, tumor segmentation, and tumor microenvironment quantification.
I also design LLM-based automation tools to streamline research workflows and professional social media management. This portfolio brings together my publications, projects, CV, and ongoing learning log.

Open to **Applied Scientist, ML Engineer, and R&D** roles across medical AI and applied ML. PhD defense: June 1, 2026.

```{=html}
<div class="cta-buttons">
  <a class="btn-primary-custom" href="cv.qmd">View CV</a>
  <div class="hero-links" aria-label="External profiles and contact">
    <a class="hero-icon-link" href="https://github.com/PierpaoloV" target="_blank" rel="me noopener" aria-label="GitHub">
      <i class="bi bi-github" aria-hidden="true"></i>
    </a>
    <a class="hero-icon-link" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/pierpaolo-vendittelli" target="_blank" rel="me noopener" aria-label="LinkedIn">
      <i class="bi bi-linkedin" aria-hidden="true"></i>
    </a>
    <a class="hero-icon-link" href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=C0h0smwAAAAJ&hl=en&oi=ao" target="_blank" rel="noopener" aria-label="Google Scholar">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" aria-hidden="true">
        <path d="M12 3L2 8l10 5 8-4v6h2V8L12 3Z" fill="currentColor"/>
        <path d="M6 11.5v4.1c0 1.1 2.7 2.4 6 2.4s6-1.3 6-2.4v-4.1l-6 3-6-3Z" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.9"/>
      </svg>
    </a>
    <a class="hero-icon-link" href="https://orcid.org/0000-0001-6712-3708" target="_blank" rel="noopener" aria-label="ORCID">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" aria-hidden="true">
        <circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10" fill="currentColor"/>
        <rect x="7.1" y="9" width="1.6" height="6" rx="0.2" fill="#0f172a"/>
        <circle cx="7.9" cy="7.1" r="0.95" fill="#0f172a"/>
        <path d="M11 9h2.3a3.2 3.2 0 1 1 0 6.4H11V9Zm1.6 1.5v3.4h.6a1.7 1.7 0 1 0 0-3.4h-.6Z" fill="#0f172a"/>
      </svg>
    </a>
    <a class="hero-icon-link" href="mailto:pierpaolo.vendittelli93@gmail.com" aria-label="Email">
      <i class="bi bi-envelope-fill" aria-hidden="true"></i>
    </a>
  </div>
</div>
```

:::

::: {.hero-photo}
![](assets/definitive_profile_picture_circle.png){.profile-photo alt="Pierpaolo Vendittelli"}
:::

:::
:::
:::

<script type="application/ld+json">
{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "Person",
  "name": "Pierpaolo Vendittelli",
  "url": "https://pierpaolov.github.io/",
  "image": "https://pierpaolov.github.io/assets/definitive_profile_picture_circle.png",
  "jobTitle": "Postdoctoral Researcher in Medical AI and Computational Pathology",
  "description": "Postdoctoral researcher developing deep-learning systems for digital pathology, clinical AI pipelines, and LLM-based automation for research workflows.",
  "worksFor": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Prinses Maxima Center for Pediatric Oncology"
  },
  "alumniOf": [
    {
      "@type": "CollegeOrUniversity",
      "name": "Radboud University Medical Center"
    },
    {
      "@type": "CollegeOrUniversity",
      "name": "University of Girona"
    },
    {
      "@type": "CollegeOrUniversity",
      "name": "University of Cassino and Southern Lazio"
    }
  ],
  "sameAs": [
    "https://github.com/PierpaoloV",
    "https://www.linkedin.com/in/pierpaolo-vendittelli",
    "https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=C0h0smwAAAAJ&hl=en&oi=ao",
    "https://orcid.org/0000-0001-6712-3708"
  ],
  "knowsAbout": [
    "Computational pathology",
    "Medical AI",
    "Digital pathology",
    "Whole-slide image analysis",
    "Machine learning",
    "Deep learning",
    "LLM agents"
  ]
}
</script>

---

## Research Interests


::: {.row}
::: {.col-md-4}
::: {.section-card}
::: {.card-icon}
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true"><circle cx="8.5" cy="9" r="4.3"/><circle cx="15.5" cy="14.5" r="3.3"/><circle cx="9.5" cy="17" r="1.8"/></svg>
:::
### Computational Pathology
Whole-slide image analysis, multi-instance learning, segmentation, and survival prediction in oncology.
:::
:::
::: {.col-md-4}
::: {.section-card}
::: {.card-icon}
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true"><circle cx="5" cy="6" r="1.9"/><circle cx="19" cy="6" r="1.9"/><circle cx="12" cy="18" r="1.9"/><path d="M7 6 L17 6"/><path d="M6.5 7.5 L10.7 16.3"/><path d="M17.5 7.5 L13.3 16.3"/></svg>
:::
### Clinical AI Systems
End-to-end pipelines for clinical deployment — reproducible, multi-center, interpretable.
:::
:::
::: {.col-md-4}
::: {.section-card}
::: {.card-icon}
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M12 3 L13.6 9.2 L20 10.5 L13.6 11.8 L12 18 L10.4 11.8 L4 10.5 L10.4 9.2 Z"/><circle cx="18.5" cy="17.5" r="1" fill="currentColor" stroke="none"/><circle cx="5.5" cy="16" r="0.8" fill="currentColor" stroke="none"/></svg>
:::
### LLM Agents & Automation
Production LLM pipelines for research workflows (paper triage, summarisation, scoring) and professional presence management.
:::
:::
:::

---

## Selected Skills

::: {.skill-group}
::: {.skill-group-label}
Core ML
:::
::: {.skill-group-badges}
<span class="skill-badge">PyTorch</span>
<span class="skill-badge">scikit-learn</span>
<span class="skill-badge">MONAI</span>
:::
:::

::: {.skill-group}
::: {.skill-group-label}
Systems & Infra
:::
::: {.skill-group-badges}
<span class="skill-badge">Docker</span>
<span class="skill-badge">SLURM</span>
:::
:::

::: {.skill-group}
::: {.skill-group-label}
LLM & APIs
:::
::: {.skill-group-badges}
<span class="skill-badge">OpenAI API</span>
<span class="skill-badge">Anthropic API</span>
:::
:::

::: {.skill-group}
::: {.skill-group-label}
Programming
:::
::: {.skill-group-badges}
<span class="skill-badge">Python</span>
<span class="skill-badge">C++</span>
<span class="skill-badge">SQL</span>
:::
:::
